title: aloysia crenata
intro: Aloysia crenata, also known as beebrush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Aloysia crenata offers various health benefits, such as relieving symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as supporting digestive health. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
